problem id: 5a19f71a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) XOR SHL(5)

examples:
  10001001 -> 01101100
  00111100 -> 01100001
  10110101 -> 00001101
  01010000 -> 10000010
  11000100 -> 10100110
  11110101 -> 00001111
  11000011 -> 01111110
  01111000 -> 11000011

query: 01001100
predicted answer: 11100010
